blocks.text: 驭 龙 师 是 最弱 职业 ? I'M  DRAKO  MAJSTRO  +
blocks.translation: Is the Dragon Tamer the weakest class? I'M DRAKO MAJSTRO+

blocks.text: 快 看 ! 快 看 漫画 独家
blocks.translation: Look! Exclusive manga release!

blocks.text: GREAT ,  IF THE  BREAKTHROUGH MATERIALS  ARE  INSIDE , I  CAN  COMPLETE  MY FOURTH  ADVANCEMENT TOMORROW .
blocks.translation: Great! If the breakthrough materials are inside, I can complete my fourth advancement tomorrow.

blocks.text: 嬉皮 漫画
blocks.translation: Hippie Manga

blocks.text: 曲 !
blocks.translation: Twist!

blocks.text: ABYSS  SECRETREALM  - REQUIRED  ABYSS  FRAGMENTS : 0,9
blocks.translation: Abyss Secret Realm - Required Abyss Fragments: 0/9

blocks.text: I  CAN'T  ENTER DIRECTLY ...  I  STILL NEED  9  ABYSS FRAGMENTS .
blocks.translation: I can’t enter directly... Still need 9 Abyss Fragments.

blocks.text: MR .  LU ,  WHY AREN'T  YOU GOING  IN ?
blocks.translation: Mr. Lu, why aren't you going in?

blocks.text: CUT  THE  ACT ,  WHY DIDN'T  YOU  TELL  ME EARLIER  THIS  SECRET REALM  CAN'T  BE ENTERED  DIRECTLY ?
blocks.translation: Cut the act! Why didn’t you tell me earlier that this secret realm can’t be entered directly?

blocks.text: OH  COME  ON ,  DON'T BE  SO  SERIOUS ,  I  WAS JUST  JOKING .
blocks.translation: Oh, come on, don’t be so serious. I was just joking.

blocks.text: PLEASE  CALM DOWN ,  MR .  LU , MISS  MEANT  NO HARM .
blocks.translation: Please calm down, Mr. Lu. She didn’t mean any harm.

blocks.text: ENOUGH NONSENSE ,  WHAT EXACTLY  ARE THESE  ABYSS FRAGMENTS ?
blocks.translation: Enough nonsense. What exactly are these Abyss Fragments?

blocks.text: AS  THE  NAME SUGGESTS ,  THEY'RE THE  NINE  KEYS  TO OPEN  IT .
blocks.translation: As the name implies, they’re the nine keys to unlock it.

blocks.text: THIS  IS  THE  10TH REALM ,  AND  THE KEYS  ARE  LOCATED WITHIN  THE  OTHER NINE  REALMS .
blocks.translation: This is the 10th realm, and the keys are scattered across the other nine realms.

blocks.text: WHAT  A  WASTE  OF TIME .  I'M  GOING  TO FIND  THE  OTHER  NINE REALMS  THEN .
blocks.translation: What a waste of time. I’m going to find those other nine realms then.

blocks.text: EH ?
blocks.translation: Huh?

blocks.text: WAIT ,  MR .  LU !  I HAVEN'T  FINISHED EXPLAINING !
blocks.translation: Wait, Mr. Lu! I haven't finished explaining!

blocks.text: WHAT  NOW ?  SAY IT  QUICKLY .
blocks.translation: What now? Make it quick.

blocks.text: LARG
blocks.translation: LARG

blocks.text: PHEW ... I  THOUGHT  YOU'D JUST  LEAVE .
blocks.translation: Phew... I thought you'd just walk away.

blocks.text: OUT  OF  THE  NINE DUNGEONS , ONLY  TWO STILL  HAVE  KEYS - THE OTHER  SEVEN  HAVE  BEEN TAKEN  BY  GANGS  FROM BOTH  NATIONS .
blocks.translation: Out of the nine dungeons, only two still have keys—gangs from both nations have claimed the other seven.

blocks.text: YOU  MUST  GATHER ALL  NINE  TO  ENTER ... WHICH  MEANS-
blocks.translation: You need all nine keys to enter... which means—

blocks.text: SO  YOU'LL  TAKE  ME TO  THOSE  SEVEN GANGS ?
blocks.translation: So you want me to help take down those seven gangs?

blocks.text: EXACTLY ,  AND  YOU , MR .  LU ,  WILL  HELP  OUR HEAVENLY  DRAGON  GANG ELIMINATE THEM .
blocks.translation: Exactly. And you, Mr. Lu, will help our Heavenly Dragon Gang take them out.

blocks.text: DAMN ... SO  THAT'S YOUR  PLAN .
blocks.translation: Damn... so that's your plan.

blocks.text: BE  QUIET ,  WE HAVENT  REACHED AN  AGREEMENT YET  STOP EMBARRASSING  US .
blocks.translation: Quiet. We haven't agreed yet, so stop making a scene.

blocks.text: 小声 ~
blocks.translation: Keep it down~

blocks.text: THE  HEAVENLY  DRAGON  GANG ELIMINATES  THE  SOUTHERN GANGS  AND  GROWS  STRONGER , WHILE  YOU  COLLECT  THE  NINE KEYS  AND  COMPLETE  YOUR ADVANCEMENT .
blocks.translation: The Heavenly Dragon Gang wipes out the southern gangs and grows stronger, while you gather the nine keys to complete your advancement.

blocks.text: THAT  WAY , IT'S  A  WIN- WIN .  WHY NOT ?
blocks.translation: It's a win-win. Why not?

blocks.text: TSK ...  REVEALING  MY IDENTITY  JUST  BROUGHT TROUBLE .  SHE  WANTS  TO USE  ME  TO  CLEAR OBSTACLES .
blocks.translation: Tsk... Revealing myself only brought trouble. She wants to use me to clear obstacles.

blocks.text: I  KNOW  NOTHING ABOUT  LOCAL  GANGS HAVING  HER  GUIDE  ME WILL  SPEED  THINGS UP .
blocks.translation: I know nothing about the local gangs. Having her guide me will speed things up.

blocks.text: ... FINE .  LET'S COOPERATE ,  BUT LET'S  SET  THE RULES  FIRST .
blocks.translation: ... Fine. Let's cooperate, but first, we set the ground rules.

blocks.text: IF  YOU  TAKE ME  TO  GANGS WITHOUT  KEYS AND  WASTE MY  TIME ,
blocks.translation:
If you drag me to gangs without the keys
and waste my time,

blocks.text: DON'T BLAME  ME FOR  TURNING HOSTILE .
blocks.translation: don't blame me if I turn hostile.

blocks.text: UNDERSTOOD !  I , CUI  ZIYI ,  VALUE LOYALTY ,  I WON'T  BREAK MY  WORD !
blocks.translation: Understood! I, Cui Ziyi, value loyalty. I won't break my word!

blocks.text: ONE  HOUR LATER
blocks.translation: One hour later

blocks.text: SOUTH  BLACK  PORT , LONGNAN  PREFECTURE
blocks.translation: South Black Port, Longnan Prefecture

blocks.text: THERE ,  THIS  IS THE  PLACE .
blocks.translation: Here it is, this is the place.

blocks.text: SOUTH  BLACK  PORT HAS  ALWAYS  BEEN CHAOTIC .  AT  FIRST , DRAGON  NATION PEOPLE  DIDN'T  MIND SOUTHERNERS LIVING  HERE .
blocks.translation: South Black Port has always been unruly. At first, the Dragon Nation didn’t mind the Southerners living here.

blocks.text: www
BUT  OVER  TIME , THOSE  SOUTHERN DOGS  ACTUALLY  TRIED TO  SEIZE  CONTROL AND  EVEN  FORMED THEIR  OWN  GANGS
blocks.translation: But over time, those Southern dogs actually tried to take over and even formed their own gangs.

blocks.text: SO  THE HEAVENLY DRAGON  GANG IS  THE  ONLY DRAGON NATION  GANG HERE ?
blocks.translation: So the Heavenly Dragon Gang is the only Dragon Nation gang left here?

blocks.text: YES ...  AND NO .
blocks.translation: Yes... and no.

blocks.text: THERE  ARE  SIX MAJOR  GANGS NOW - THREE FROM  EACH SIDE .
blocks.translation: There are six major gangs now—three on each side.

blocks.text: BESIDES  US , THERE'S  THE SOUTHERN NETHER  GANG AND  FLAME GANG .
blocks.translation: Besides us, there’s the Southern Nether Gang and the Flame Gang.

blocks.text: III
blocks.translation: III

blocks.text: BUT  THOSE TWO  DON'T  CARE ABOUT  SOUTHERN ENCROACHMENT AT  ALL .
blocks.translation: But those two don’t give a damn about Southern encroachment.

blocks.text: ww
THEY'VE COMPLETELY FORGOTTEN THEIR  PACT WITH  US !
blocks.translation: They've completely forgotten our pact!

blocks.text: THE  THREE  DRAGON KINGDOM  GANGS ORIGINALLY  SWORE TO  BUILD  SOUTH BLACK  PORT  INTO  A PROPER  BORDER TOWN .
blocks.translation: The three Dragon Kingdom gangs once vowed to turn South Black Port into a proper border town.

blocks.text: BUT  NOW  THEY ONLY  CARE  ABOUT THEIR  CURRENT PLEASURES , EVEN GOING  SO  FAR  AS  TO RECRUIT SOUTHERN DOGS  INTO  THEIR RANKS !
blocks.translation: But now they're only chasing their pleasures, even recruiting Southern dogs into their ranks!

blocks.text: 咯 哎 ~
blocks.translation: Heh, sigh ~

blocks.text: IF  THE  SOUTHERN NATION  TAKES ADVANTAGE  OF  THE DRAGON  NATION  BEING BUSY  WITH  THE  ANCIENT GODS  IN  THE  FAR  NORTH TO  OCCUPY  THIS  PLACE , THOSE  TWO  GANGS  WILL BE  TIME  BOMBS .
blocks.translation: If the Southern Nation exploits the Dragon Nation's focus on the ancient gods to seize this place, those two gangs will become ticking time bombs.

blocks.text: SO  YOU  WANT TO  STRIKE FIRST ?
blocks.translation: So you’re saying we strike first?

blocks.text: EXACTLY ,  STEP ONE ,  WIPE  OUT THE  SOUTHERN NETHER  AND FLAME  GANGS !
blocks.translation: Exactly. Step one: wipe out the Southern Nether and Flame gangs!

blocks.text: I'LL  ABSORB THEIR  MEMBERS AND  TERRITORY ,
blocks.translation: I'll absorb their members and territory.

blocks.text: AND  THE  TWO KEYS  FROM THEIR  LEADERS GO  TO  YOU .
blocks.translation: And the two keys from their leaders go to you.

blocks.text: EASY .  AT  DAWN , SPREAD  THE WORD - I'LL DEAL WITH  THEM .
blocks.translation: Easy. At dawn, spread the word—I’ll handle them.

blocks.text: STRAIGHT- FORWARD  AS ALWAYS ,  MR . LU !
blocks.translation: Straightforward as always, Mr. Lu!

blocks.text: STAY  AT  OUR CAMP  TONIGHT . IT'S  JUST  TENTS- HOPE  YOU  DON'T MIND .
blocks.translation: Stay at our camp tonight. It’s just tents—hope you don’t mind.

blocks.text: I'VE  TREKKED THROUGH  THE WESTERN  FRONTIER ON  FOOT ,  NOT HAVING  A  TENT  IS NOTHING .
blocks.translation: I’ve trekked the western frontier on foot; no tent is nothing to me.

blocks.text: MISS ! DISASTER !
blocks.translation: Miss! Disaster!

blocks.text: THE  CAMP IS  UNDER ATTACK !
blocks.translation: The camp is under attack!

blocks.text: WHAT !?
blocks.translation: What!?

blocks.text: COULD IT BE THE OTHER GANGS MAKING THE FIRST MOVE ?
blocks.translation: Could it be the other gangs making the first move?

blocks.text: THE  FIRST MOVE ?
POSSIBLE , LET'S  GO CHECK !
blocks.translation: Possible. Let's go check it out!

blocks.text: YON
blocks.translation: Yon

blocks.text: LONGNAN  SOUTH  BLACK  PORT . HEAVENLY  DRAGON  CAMP
blocks.translation:
Longnan South Black Port
Heavenly Dragon Camp

blocks.text: BOSS !
blocks.translation: Boss!

blocks.text: A  POWERFUL FIGHTER  IS  AT THE  GATE - WE CAN'T  HANDLE HER !
blocks.translation: A fierce fighter's at the gate—she’s too much for us!

blocks.text: DON'T  PANIC ! GIVE  ME  THE DETAILS !
blocks.translation: Don’t panic! Tell me everything!

blocks.text: SHE'S  NOT  FROM
SHE'S NOT FROM SOUTH BLACK PORT . SHE'S INJURED OVER A DOZEN BROTHERS , AND LAO JIU IS ABOUT TO LOSE HIS GRIP ON HER !
blocks.translation: She’s not from South Black Port. She’s wounded over a dozen men, and Lao Jiu’s losing control!

blocks.text: SHE  HITS EVERYONE  SHE SEES  AND  KEEPS ASKING  WHERE LU  FAN  IS !
blocks.translation: She’s striking everyone and shouting for Lu Fan!

blocks.text: ... LU  FAN ?
blocks.translation: ...Lu Fan?

blocks.text: UGH ... !
blocks.translation: Ugh...!

blocks.text: LAO  JIU !!
blocks.translation: Lao Jiu!!

blocks.text: WHO  ARE  YOU ? WHY  ARE  YOU ATTACKING  MY GANG ?
blocks.translation: Who are you? Why are you attacking my crew?

blocks.text: LU  FAN ,  YOU FINALLY  SHOW YOUR  FACE ...
blocks.translation: Lu Fan, so you finally show yourself...

blocks.text: THAT  VOICE ... ! WHY  IS  SHE HERE !?
blocks.translation: That voice...! Why is she here!?

blocks.text: YOU  HAVEN'T FORGOTTEN ME ,  HAVE YOU ?
blocks.translation: You haven't forgotten me, have you?

blocks.text: YOU'RE SUPPOSED  TO  TAKE RESPONSIBILITY FOR  ME ,  YOU KNOW .
blocks.translation: You're the one who should take responsibility for me.
